Author: ImperfectRain
Name: Dalashade
Description: Dalashade generates a separate ReShade preset from your base preset, then nudges known shader values using territory, weather, time, combat, cutscenes, and optional screenshot analysis. Use /dalashade to open it.
Punchline: A ReShade preset that pays attention to where you are.
Changelog: v2 adds all-around improved logic, support for custom shaders, massively more transparent GUI and documentation
